# v0.1.22

This release improves resilience for slow or unstable OpenAI-compatible provider links.

## Added

- `AKERNEL_OPENAI_TIMEOUT_SECONDS`
- `AKERNEL_OPENAI_MAX_RETRIES`
- `AKERNEL_OPENAI_RETRY_BACKOFF_SECONDS`

## Changed

- Provider calls now default to 180 seconds per attempt and three retries after the first attempt.
- Retry delays use exponential backoff.
- Network diagnostics now suggest retry/timeout tuning instead of only pointing to VPN/base URL checks.
